observations: c092 is the strongest SigLIP hard-shape result so far by aggregate metric.
c092 w14 improves c089/c091 substantially and reaches improved_rate 1.0.
c092 collapses many training rows toward bald green human faces, losing chibi/frog body diversity.
heldout07 remains weak because monster side-profile and red-eye jaw silhouette are not preserved.
